entry.title: Connecting SAP BW/4HANA to SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Dear SAP Datasphere Community,

I'm having some trouble connecting SAP Datasphere to SAP BW/4HANA and could really use some guidance.

Here's what's happening:

I logged into Semantic Onboarding and tried to set up an SAP BW/4HANA connection.

I got this message:
"You must have access to an existing space with at least one relevant connection before you can import entities from it."

I tried again through the Connections menu and selected "SAP BW/4HANA Model Transfer."

This time, it asked for:
Live Data Connection
SAP HANA SQL ACCESS

What I need help with:

How can I make sure I have access to an existing space with the relevant connection?
What are the steps to set up the "Live Data Connection" and "SAP HANA SQL ACCESS"?

Any detailed steps or advice would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Priyanka

entry.title: Wrong posting date for sequential order
entry.content:
Hello dear Experts,

Client needs the ability to create billing with a backdated date, for example: today is 24.07 and the client wants to create billing with billing date of 18.07. In their system, when I try to release document for accounting that meets the requirements, the fallowing message appears " Wrong posting date for sequential order (Header Phase 001)". Do you have anny ideas how I can reslove this problem?

Thanks in advance experts.

entry.title: Re: TM unable to create freight settlement document
entry.content: Hello, did you find a solution?

entry.title: Groovy issue
entry.content:
Hello experts

I am learning groovy to use it in Iflows configuration
I installed the GroovyConsole editor on my machine

I am testing with the next script

But when i run the script, the system is sending the next error:

unable to resolve class com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.message

Do you know how to solve this issue?

Thanks in advanced

entry.title: Re: We cannot delete the Job Location in LMS
entry.content: This is quite frustrating. When you search by job location it brings up locations that are no longer in use by any employees. Is there a way to make job locations that aren't being used "inactive"? I understand why we don't delete them but having every single location we've ever had come up on a list is rather frustrating to scroll through.

entry.title: Re: SAP NWDS 7.5 Download
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you please download and share to me?

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow PO - How to Skip/Auto Approve
entry.content: Attached is WF screen shot, in this 6 levels, any approver can repeat more then 1, L2,L3 could be same or L2, L4 & L5 could be same. Also if L2 subsitiute to L3 in this scenario also system shoudl skip/auto approve

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow PO - How to Skip/Auto Approve

entry.title: Re: GUI 8.0 for Windows 10 and 11
entry.content: Recently I got new windows 11 laptop. I installed SAP GUI 8.0 patch 6. SAP Logon works for a while then it crashes. I searched the Sap support portal with no success. Please advise

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One upgrade path - upgraded!
entry.content:
Hi @Guy_Sujetzki 

This means a great saving of time and effort that every SAP Business One professional will appreciate.

Kind regards,

 Erick

entry.title: Re: MDK SAP - Styling Dinamically / Variables
entry.content:
I'm not sure I understand what you are wanting to accomplish. Are you using the Object Table in multi-select mode to pick from the list the items you want to process in the backend?  Once you pick them what happens?  In an offline app you would normally update those entities locally and when you have a connection sync to the backend but it depends on your app / backend / requirements of course.

Your rules for the styles just need to return the name of the style class from the .less file you want applied to the cell.  Your rule can use whatever logic you need to determine if the cell should be styled or not.

entry.title: Re: Can't found app "Manage Production Supply Areas"
entry.content:
Hi @Pdud_97 

 

The app is available with the assignment of the business catalog SAP_SCM_BC_KNBN_CTRLC_MGMT_MC 

 

Please check in the Business Catalog app if SAP_SCM_BC_KNBN_CTRLC_MGMT_MC appears

 

If not , then you need to active one of the scope items below

 

1E3 Material Replenishment with Kanban - External Procurement
4B3 Material Replenishment with Kanban - In-House Production
4B4 Material Replenishment with Kanban - Stock Transfer

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Landed Cost Functionality
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking to see if anyone can give me guidance on the landed cost functionality. I have watched many YouTube videos and read many articles. The one thing I cannot tell is if this feature is customizable or not. From what I have seen then the standard use case will not work for what I am trying to do. 

I am trying to apply a standard freight costs to my incoming raw material through the GRPO with a journal entry of:

Debit - Raw Material
Credit - Standard Raw Material
Credit - Standard Freight 

Is landed cost the right function for this set up

Any advice would be helpful

entry.title: Signavio Security
entry.content:
Hello, please I need to confirm if Signavio meets the following requirements on its platform:

- Data encryption is compliant with FIPS 140 level 2 or higher?
- Does the platform have implemented Data Loss Prevention (DLP) mechanisms?
- Does it have mechanisms to prevent Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks (Anti-DDoS)?
- Does it allow its clients to conduct independent vulnerability assessments?

Tanks in advance

Kind Regards

Gustavo Giusto

entry.title: SAP version 1809 on S/4HANA to SAP RISE
entry.content:
Hello architects,

I have a customer with SAP version 1809 on S/4HANA and the customer does not want to upgrade before going to RISE.

I have identified that SAP has created note 3246630 for these scenarios and I would like to understand if it is useful for this customer ?

The customer is in Onpremise and will go to RISE.

entry.title: Transform your phone’s camera into a next-gen input tool
entry.content:
The Scenario

Imagine you work at a busy international airport where shipments from global suppliers arrive daily. Recently, your country introduced a regulation requiring all airports to maintain a list of international suppliers using air freight to send parcels smaller than 1 m³. Your task is to extract supplier information directly from shipping documents such as invoices, packing lists, and courier bills, and record this information in an S4/HANA system set up by the national department of foreign trade.

 

Why Pen and Paper Won’t Cut It

Managing shipment details manually by noting them down on a piece of paper and digitizing your notes later is not just time-consuming but feels like something out of the second century AD! While creating a mobile app could eliminate the need for manual data entry, typing on a small screen can be cumbersome and prone to errors, especially with special characters often found in foreign languages.

 

A Cutting-Edge Solution

SAP Build Code on SAP Discovery Center

 

SAP Document Information Extraction Service on SAP Discovery Center

 

Instead, you can build a cutting-edge solution using SAP Build Code and SAP Document Information Extraction Service to build an application that lets you extract information from images. Let’s see how you can build this amazing experience.

 

Building the solution

Getting Started: Essential Tutorials

Although this blog won’t be a step-by-step tutorial, it will point you toward the essential resources and concepts to help you get started.

  • Complete the Tutorials:
    • Use Generative AI to Process Business Documents
    • Try Out the SAP BTP SDK Wizard for Android
      Note: You can also implement this mobile app using SAP BTP SDK for iOS or Mobile Development Kit (MDK).
 
Create  Integration with SAP Mobile Services

You can either use your own use-case or this supplier form. Based on your use-case, you need to create a schema on the SAP Document Information Extraction Service, similar to the example below. If you are using the provided supplier form, select "Invoice" as the Document Type when creating the schema. Adding a description helps the AI model contextually match the extracted results to the fields defined in the schema.

 
Seamless Integration with SAP Mobile Services

To safeguard your application from potential disruptions due to API changes, add your APIs to SAP Mobile Services instead of hardcoding them into your app.

  • Retrieve API Credentials:
    • In the Instances & Subscriptions section of your sub-account, locate the service instance for Document Information Extraction Service (e.g., default_document-information-extraction-trial).
    • Click on the key under credentials and note the following:
      • url
      • uaa → clientid
      • uaa → clientsecret
      • uaa → url

Note: If a key does not exist, you can create one.

  • Configure SAP Mobile Services:
    • Go to SAP Mobile Services and create a new destination in the Mobile Services Connectivity.

      Step

      Field Key

      Field Value

      Basic Info

      Destination Name

      dox.service.destination

      Basic Info

      URL

      <url>/document-information-extraction/v1/

      Destination Configuration

      SSO Mechanism

      OAuth2 Client Credentials

      Destination Configuration

      Token Service URL

      <uaa → url>/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials&response_type=token

      Destination Configuration

      Client ID

      <uaa → clientid>

      Destination Configuration

      Client Secret

      <uaa → clientsecret>

    • Test your configuration by using the “ping” and “launch in browser” actions for the newly added destination. You should see a blank page upon successful authentication.
      Note: If prompted, please provide valid credentials to authenticate yourself.
Building the experience in your app
  • Write code to capture an image and send it to the Document Information Extraction Service using this API: Upload Document API.
  • Write code to pre-populate an input form from results extracted from the uploaded image using this API: Get Result API.

For inspiration, please check out the Scan2InputPoC repository on GitHub.
Note: this project is a proof of concept created by the author and is not an official recommendation from SAP; it is provided as-is.

 

Testing the solution

 

 

 

 

 

Once you have built your application with the necessary logic and configuration, it's time for the fun part: testing it in different scenarios such as:

  • Lighting Conditions: Test in various lighting settings such as dim lighting, sunlight, and artificial light.
  • Document Angles: Position the document at different angles on a flat surface or vertically.
  • Special Characters: Test documents containing special characters not found in the English alphabet.
  • Handwritten Documents: Try scanning and processing handwritten documents to evaluate the application’s accuracy.

Here's a video demo of what the capability would look like: 

 

What Next?

As you can see, you can quickly build a solution using SAP BTP to address a demanding problem in an ever-changing world. This powerful technology can also be used for digitizing patient records in healthcare and capturing maintenance reports in field services. I am very eager for all of you to try this out and hear about your possible use cases in the comments section.

 

Important Links

  • Product Help: SAP Build Code | SAP Mobile Services | SAP Document Information Extraction Service
  • Get Started Tutorials: SAP BTP SDK for Android | SAP Document Information Extraction Service
  • API Reference: SAP Document Information Extraction Service | SAP BTP SDK for Android

entry.title: Re: How can I Copy Material Master in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Arghadip

 

Product Master records can be copied in Manage Product Master Data app but Masking Material Description is not possible . If you want to create materials automatically then you can create your own custom app

using API_PRODUCT_SRV and populate the description with whatever logic / format you wish

 

Best regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Guide: Deploying CAP Application with SQLite Database
entry.content: Hi Jay, I managed to include the db.sqlite in the MTA archive, but still no success in the application. I still get: SqliteError: no such table

entry.title: HANA Cloud database connection not present in run configuration dependencies
entry.content:
Hello all,

I'm developing a full-stack CAP application that includes three main components: a Fiori list page for front end, and a SAP HANA Cloud database for data storage, and a CAP app to tie the two together.

I have successfully bound and deployed to the database connection, as evidenced by the schema's produced and my ability to import data via the database explorer. My understanding is that the action of binding includes the database as a "dependency" to the project.


My issue is that I cannot seem to expose database data to the Fiori list page. I haven't started developing the list page yet, but this data should at the very least be listed in the raw OData output when I run the application. The connected database is not showing up as a dependency under run configurations, and I do not have the option to make a "production" configuration to see if it's any different.

Unsurprisingly, running this configuration uses the in-memory database feature, and doesn't expose the HANA Cloud data I've set up.

Could someone tell me where my issue could be? I've tried researching this question, but everyone seems to assume that if you set up your database connection properly, it should be available in run configurations. No one seems to be able to do the first but not the second.

Lastly, I'll include two files from the project I've been messing with the most. I assume the problem is somewhere in "[project root]/package.json" or "[project root]/mta.yaml", but again I can't be sure.

package.json:

{
  "name": "BWZ_User_Statistics",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "A simple CAP project.",
  "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@cap-js/hana": "^1",
    "@sap/cds": "^8",
    "@sap/xssec": "^4",
    "express": "^4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@cap-js/cds-types": "^0.6",
    "@cap-js/sqlite": "^1",
    "@sap/cds-dk": ">=7"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "cds-serve"
  },
  "cds": {
    "build": {
      "target": "gen",
      "tasks": [
        {
          "for": "hana",
          "src": "db",
          "options": {
            "model": [
              "db",
              "srv",
              "app"
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "for": "nodejs",
          "src": "srv",
          "options": {
            "model": [
              "db",
              "srv",
              "app"
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    "requires": {
      "[production]": {
        "db": "hana",
        "auth": "xsuaa"
      }
    }
  }
}

mta.yaml:

_schema-version: 3.3.0
ID: BWZ_User_Statistics
description: A simple CAP project.
version: 1.0.0
modules:
  - name: BWZ_User_Statistics-srv
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    requires:
      - name: cross-container-service-2
      - name: BWZ_User_Statistics-auth
      # - name: BWZ_User_Statistics-db
    provides:
      - name: srv-api
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      readiness-health-check-http-endpoint: /health
      readiness-health-check-type: http
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm
  - name: BWZ_User_Statistics-db-deployer
    type: hdb
    path: gen/db
    requires:
      # - name: cross-container-service-1
      #   properties:
      #     TARGET_CONTAINER: ~{hdi-container-name}
      - name: cross-container-service-2
        # group: SERVICE_REPLACEMENTS
        properties:
          # key: ServiceName_1
          # service: ~{the-service-name}
          TARGET_CONTAINER: ~{the-service-name}
      # - name: BWZ_User_Statistics-db
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
  - name: BWZ_User_Statistics
    type: approuter.nodejs
    path: app/router
    requires:
      - name: srv-api
        group: destinations
        properties:
          forwardAuthToken: true
          name: srv-api
          url: ~{srv-url}
      - name: BWZ_User_Statistics-auth
    parameters:
      disk-quota: 256M
      keep-existing-routes: true
      memory: 256M
resources:
  # - name: cross-container-service-1
  #   type: org.cloudfoundry.existing-service
  #   parameters:
  #     service-name: hditest
  #   properties:
  #     hdi-container-name: ${service-name}
  - name: cross-container-service-2
    type: org.cloudfoundry.existing-service
    parameters:
      service-name: test_1
    properties:
      the-service-name: ${service-name}
  - name: BWZ_User_Statistics-auth
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: xsuaa
      service-plan: application
      path: ./xs-security.json
      config:
        xsappname: BWZ_User_Statistics-${org}-${space}
        tenant-mode: dedicated
  # - name: BWZ_User_Statistics-db
  #   type: com.sap.xs.hdi-container
  #   parameters:
  #     service: hana
  #     service-plan: hdi-shared
parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
  before-all:
    - builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npx cds build --production

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: IDOC Data Records Searchable Fields in WE02
entry.content:
Where can we maintain or configure the ability to search fields visible in data records detail of transaction WE02.  These are fields listed in the "Content of Selected Segment", two columns are "Fld Name" and "Fld Cont." (contains the data we want to search on.)

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Opt...
entry.content:
Hello,
Thank you for sharing your experience. We are primarily using simple stories without any scripts.

entry.title: Re: Task 6 - API endpoint with payload required (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content: Hi there - I wrote this up - let me know what you think! "Automatic validation in OData and REST calls with CAP" https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/07/24/automatic-validation-in-odata-and-rest-calls-with-cap/

entry.title: Re: Deploying CAP services with the in-memory SQLite database
entry.content:
Thank you @zavadav . Adding the default sqlite3 dependency was the final step to make this work.

I left both @cap-js/sqlite and sqlite3 and it worked.

entry.title: Re: MDK SAP - Styling Dinamically / Variables
entry.content:
What I mean is that I want to change the state of a variable, in this case ‘PendingOperation’ to false, because what I want to do is to update the style of the title and other texts, but I can't get the style to be executed again. I've been looking around and there is a .redraw() but it doesn't work because it goes to the initial state (I think) and the style change is not reflected. I'm used to working in React and Angular and components communicate with each other by using variables in a service, observables or parameters of this style.So I'm looking for something similar: that the styles.js learns about the changes and returns the appropriate .less class.

 

Editing: to answer your question at the beginning, yes; it is basically a list of multi options with the checkboxes so that I can then click on a 'Collect' button and the action is sent to SAP to collect these unpaid amounts. This works when there is an internet connection, but when there is not, I want to do what I explained above. I can share more code if you need (or images / video to show the process that I want)

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration: move away from those IDoc messages!
entry.content:
@pazabel WLF_IDOC was a major  game changer when it comes to managing daily business IDoc traffic - totally agree!

against SAP Standard: Never change a running system!

#idoc #loveit #asyncbutalmostthere

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content:
Hello @qmacro ,

My submission for task 7 :

Odata Call:

 

CDS REPL was a great help to understand the querying with different options. Also your blog Turning an OData expand into a cds.ql CQL query with a projection function in CAP was a great help too to clear the concepts. Thanks a ton!

entry.title: Re: Corporate applicants to the digital skills initiative: Tell us your story!
entry.content: can you recommend me a few open positions as SAP consultant? im struggling to find a foot in

entry.title: Re: Partial scrap confirmation in DM, Quantity Confirmati...
entry.content:
Hi Oliver , 

You can achieve the same using WC POD by enabling a quantity field input in sfc selection page or after the SFC selection in SFC card area . Use POD designer to enable the Quantity input field . Field Details here : https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/pod-designer/work-center-pod-selection . 

or beside SFC card as below for quantity input before start of SFC . More details here : https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/pod-designer/sfc-card

You can customize the operation activity list with quantity field display to see the quantity progress using column editor of operation activity plugin in POD designer .

 

Now you will be able to report scrap using NC on specific quantity without full confirmation.

Hope this helps.

Thanks

Rahul

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
Hello @qmacro ,

I am getting an error as below when i am trying to call URL - 

GET {{baseURL}}/odata/v4/northbreeze/Products/11

 

Does this mean that the service is not implemented properly, kindly suggest!

entry.title: Re: Task 6 - API endpoint with payload required (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content:
My submission for task 6. Finally, I got it working.

I was using CAP version 8, and that's why passing a plain array did not work (it got rejected). Thanks @qmacro, for the explanations in your blog post.

I noticed that if I didn't define any parameter for the action, data passed at runtime was still ignored. However, if I defined a dummy parameter as shown below, the data was passed to the event handler.

@open action highestValue(dummy: Int32) returns Int32;

entry.title: Re: SAP ERP Solution unit onboarding guide for e-Invoicing in KSA
entry.content:
Hi @adnanmaqbool ,

The issue was ultimately caused by incorrect formatting / invalid CSR certificate being sent to the simulation environment. Once we resolved the certificate issue and completed the onboarding, we were able to start sending invoices to the sim environment. that's when the second issue came up that ended up being a ZATCA back end server related issue that I escalated through our ZATCA relationship manager. (Side note, can't confirm if it was related but our org name had an "&" sign in it that may have not been a supported character type)

Providing notes from our Cloud Integration expert below.

  • Invoice from S4Cloud to Cloud Integration – Successful. The process initiates successfully with the invoice being sent from S4 Cloud to our Company Integration Suite Tenant. I traced and saw the invoice xml in the integration suite.
  • Integration Suite to ZATCA: The iflow is transforming and posting the invoice to ZATCA Clearance Invoice Endpoint. This is where we encounter the problem. We are receiving the timeout exception from the ZATCA system. 

Possible Cause can be - The back end ZATCA server is taking too long to respond and exceeds the timeout value that was set in your application  ( may be the clearance service is on maintenance or service is down). 

To further rule out, I tried calling various ZATCA Endpoints from postman and browser. All other endpoints are returning either bad request ( HTTP 400 error) Or Internal Server Error( HTTP 500 Error) saying the payload is not in expected format. I expected same when I call the clearance invoice endpoint, however I received couldn’t connect to endpoint error message.

The error says the end point is either incorrect or a proxy is blocking the service. While other ZATCA services are working fine. We are receiving either incorrect payload error or bad request which means the system is able to call the endpoint/service but the payload is not in the expected format. This explains why the registration service worked but not the clearance invoice service.

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content:
@qmacro 

I have uploaded my code to the following repository (branch "task7-2"). I cloned the base project from your repository and added the function and "main.js" file.

entry.title: Re: Content Repository Migration in mind ?
entry.content:
I also tried using Z_MIGRATE_ARCHIVELINK to migrate our PBS PCL ContentLink repository to SAP Content Server 7.5 but says there are no documents to migrate. The PCL server is using ArchiveLink as the document area, so not sure why this wouldnt work. I do see that tables TOA01, TOA02, etc are empty. Is there something that can assist me in migrating from the PCL server to the SAP Content Server?

Thanks in advance, 

Ryan

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
Hi @YogSSohanee ,

I faced the same issue in the previous task. In my case, at the end of my event handler code, I wrote `return super.init`, but it had to be corrected to `return super.init()`.

My service seems to work fine but some how Tester service is not able to reach it.

entry.title: what is IMS-4483 ?
entry.content: I am trying to send a set of documents through Ariba but got a big date difference between transmissions and saw that the acknowledgment date was a week later normally it is the same day.

entry.title: Re: Create Button Group on Object Page Header in Fiori El...
entry.content: Hi Sandeep, we indeed used the manifest based one to achieve the grouping. We couldn't find a way to handle it directly from backend.

entry.content: My submission for task 8.

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake,

I tried your code, it works then you return the result of the super.init() function (instead of the function itself):

 

return super.init();

entry.title: Getting "Vocab validation failed" for URI error
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

We are sending JSON data to an on-premise oDATA v4 service from CPI but getting the below error. We tried manipulating the payload, headers, URL etc. but nothing seems to work.

Could someone help with the root cause of this issue?

"org.apache.camel.RuntimeCamelException: com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.exceptions.OData4Exception: Vocab validation failed for URI: http://host:port/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_COMMON',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value, cause: com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.exception.ODataProcessingException: Vocab validation failed for URI:"

entry.content: I am facing the same issue

entry.title: Unreadable characters in J2EE configtool
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a VERY BIG problem! I must reset the AS Java password on a J2EE instance. The OS is AIX.
However, when I launch the configtool, I am unable to read the screen !!!

Please kindly advise on how to solve the problem !! The maintenance window is VERY soon! Thank you so much !!

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Release 2024.14
entry.content:
Hi @jmoon, please try the link again. I have not had any issues accessing it.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD_PPT

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Release 2024.15
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud brings together analytics and planning with unique integration to SAP applications and seamless access to heterogenous data sources. It helps everyone in your organization make decisions without doubt with trusted insights and integrated plans.

This blog post introduces the features of the SAP Analytics Cloud 2024.15 release available for SAP Analytics Cloud FastTrack customers. For SAP Analytics Cloud Quarterly Release Cycle (QRC) customers, this release and its features will be available as part of the QRC Q3 2024 release. View the QRC release schedule here.

 

System Administration and Technical Requirements

 

Although not required, you may upgrade to the latest SAP Analytics Cloud agent version 1.0.409 to take advantage of all data acquisition types.

The agent’s minimum version remains at 1.0.75, with the following exceptions:

  • Version 1.0.99 for SAP ERP/SQL Database
  • Version 1.0.365 for SAP universe (UNX). The SAP Analytics Cloud agent requires additional setup steps, for more details see SAP Note 3262098
  • Version 1.0.353 for SAP Business Warehouse (BW)
  • Version 1.0.235 for SAP HANA View
  • Version 1.0.248 for File Server

For more information, see System Requirements and Technical Prerequisites.

Regarding supported features and required updates for the integration of SAP BW with SAP Analytics Cloud, refer to SAP Note 2541557 for further details.

Regarding supported features and required updates for live universe access through SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect with SAP Analytics Cloud, refer to SAP Note 2771921 for further details.

Please download the latest version of the Simple Deployment Kit from Software Center.

Note: To avoid downloading older versions and potentially exposing users to a vulnerable bundling of the Cloud Connector with SAPJVM, or Apache Tomcat, only the three latest versions of the kits are available to download.

For Cloud agent version change management details, refer to SAP Note 3264839.

 

Release Highlights

  • AI for Planning and Analytics
    • Just Ask: Additional User Rights
  • Data Integration
    • Deprecate Salesforce Connection
  • Enterprise Planning
    • Story API: Add decline support for reviewer on composite task
  • Story Extensibility
    •  Enhance Performance Tool for Story Designer View time Scenarios

 

AI for Planning and Analytics

 

Just Ask: Additional User Rights

To provide Just Ask admins with more granular control over access, the following permissions have been implemented:

  • Execute: Enables users to use Just Ask. The tool's bulb icon will appear on the top-right corner of the page.
  • Maintain: Users with this permission can in addition to accessing the tool, upload models not explicitly indexed for Just Ask.

 

Data Integration

 

Deprecate Salesforce Connection

Data connections to Salesforce are no longer supported. To import data from Salesforce systems, use the SQL Database connection using JDBC or APOS Live Data Gateway for Acquired Connections. See SAP Note 3402695.

 

Enterprise Planning

 

Story API: Add decline support for reviewer on composite task

In composite tasks, the functions “decline()” and “canUserDecline()” that were already available for assignees of composite tasks, are now also available for reviewers of composite tasks. This way the API behaves consistently with the UI. Both assignees and reviewers can decline a task on the UI, and now also via stories or analytic applications that offer these functions via scripting.

 

Story Extensibility

 

Enhance Performance Tool for Story Designer View time scenarios

In the optimized story experience, users can use the performance analysis tool in view time, which provides loading sequence, story statistics, and recommendations based on the assets in your story for you to analyze the story performance.

 

This blog post only provides a high-level overview of the latest features and enhancements of SAP Analytics Cloud. You can find more details on these features in your In-App Help Guide for FastTrack customers and see this SAP Knowledge Base Article if you’d like to learn more about FastTrack and Quarterly Release Cycle releases. 

If you have any questions regarding the content in this blog post, you can comment below. If you have product specific or technical questions, post a question to our SAP Analytics Cloud Questions & Answers forum. Visit our SAP Analytics Cloud Community pages to find more product information, best practices, and more. And check out our SAP Road Map Explorer to see more upcoming features of SAP Analytics Cloud.

entry.title: Re: Can the system make a beep/bell sound when there is a...
entry.content:
I could imagine adding an onAfterRefresh script that determines if there is an error on the screen (by checking the status bar) and then plays the sound you want, specified by its URL. So, something like this:

function beep() { 
  var audio = new Audio( 
'https://media.geeksforgeeks.org/wp-content/uploads/20190531135120/beep.mp3'); 
  audio.play(); 
} 
        
if (session.findById("wnd[0]/sbar").messageType == "E") {
    beep();
}

entry.title: Consuming a CAP OData service from SAP Mobile Services (on CF)
entry.content:
How do we consume an OData V4 service exposed by the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) with SAP Mobile Services (Cloud Foundry).

After deploying my CAP MTA project, I would like to consume the OData service from this CAP project in Mobile Services for a native app, the mobile services & the cap deployed service are on the same subaccount

In mobile services CF, under connectivity, I need to add a destination to my OData service (there are different type of destination and it's not clear)

do I need to reference my app via a BTP destination or I simply use the CAP OData service URL?

example with the sample sap bookshop app

https://<subdomain>.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/bookshop

I also have a destination named bookshop-destination

thanks

entry.title: What are the best practices to migrate services from Subaccount A to Subaccount B?
entry.content:
We need to move services to the correct subaccount as they are currently in a old subaccount.
We have already migrated the services to the new Global Account.

We are concerned with possible disruptions, for that reason, we want to understand the best practices for this migration.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: What are the best practices to migrate services from...
entry.content:
Hello!

About the Best Practices:
The best practices for SAP BTP are documented at Best Practices for SAP BTP Help Page.
The specific topic that would make sense to you is in regards to the backup of data. So please, take special attention at Configuring Backup.

About managing the services in the subaccounts:
In order to move service from one subaccount to another, within the same Global Account, you must refer to Managing Entitlements and Quotas Using the Cockpit.
If the Service entitlement is in a different Global Account, you need to migrate the entitlement via a Replacement Order as described at 2498151 - Migrating solutions from one Global Account to another

Wishing you a pleasant day!😉
Vini
SAP Support
BTP Integrations & Foundation Services | BTP Foundation Technologies

entry.title: Combine and SUM query
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am struggling to get the correct formatting to be able to display the sum correctly. I have all the data that I need from the following query; however, instead of showing (T4."OnHand"), (T4."IsCommited"),and (T4."OnOrder") in the table, I want to sum those fields and display only the result as "Available QTY".

SELECT T0."ItemCode", T0."ItemName", T0."ItmsGrpCod", T3."ItmsGrpNam", T1."PriceList", T2."ListName", T1."Price", T4."OnHand", T4."IsCommited", T4."OnOrder" FROM OITM T0 INNER JOIN ITM1 T1 ON T0."ItemCode" = T1."ItemCode" INNER JOIN OPLN T2 ON T1."PriceList" = T2."ListNum" INNER JOIN OITB T3 ON T0."ItmsGrpCod" = T3."ItmsGrpCod" INNER JOIN OITW T4 ON T0."ItemCode" = T4."ItemCode" WHERE T0."ItmsGrpCod" = 126 AND T2."ListNum" = 3

I tried some modifications using UNION ALL and then SELECT(sum(T4."OnHand")-(T4."IsCommited")+(T4."OnOrder"))As"Available QTY"FROM OITW T4 but I', not getting what I need. Any assistance in the correct formatting would be much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content:
@M-K 
Thanks for pointing it out. I accidentally omitted '()' after init.

entry.title: Re: SEN Manager (Hana) not started
entry.content:
Hi,

If you have completed all the instructions in the Installation documentation and are still getting the error, I recommend that you raise a support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-MGR and get support to take a look.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Signavio Security
entry.content:
Hi Gustavo,

The short answer to your question is yes.

  • Data encryption is AES 256 bit by default. KMS of Signavio is backed by FIPS-140-2 compliant hardware security model.
  • Signavio follows the SAP security principles for data loss prevention.
  • Signavio has DDoS protection at both network and transport layer
  • SAP does allow clients to perform penetration testing (on a case-by-case basis) subject to certain terms and conditions

For more detailed security related questions, it might be best to reach out to your Customer Success Partner or Signavio Account Executive to handle them seamlessly.

You can also find a lot of the answers on SAP Trust center.

Cheers,
Projit

entry.title: Re: Payroll Control Center Error - No payroll area selected
entry.content: Thanks for taking time to post a reply to your question itself, this really saved my day today !

entry.title: Help with Audit Log in Ariba Action Types, Event Types, Document Types
entry.content:
Hi,

I am in audit log in Ariba and would like to understand the definition for all the Action Types, Event Types, Document IDs and Document Types. Is there documentation or someone kind enough to help me understand the search filters and what they are for for an Administrator role?

entry.title: Cost Distribution TM with project’s stock (Q) materials is using Transaction Key = KBS
entry.content:
Cost Distribution TM with project’s stock (Q) materials is using Transaction Key = KBS despite of it is a material for stock (S4 HANA 2022)

1. We created a purchase order with Account assigment Q, with WBS: XXXXX and inventory account 14202510 in Plant 1001. Then we created the GR for project stock.

2. Next, we created a Stock Transfer order from Plant 1001 to Plant 1000 and Delivery.

3. Then in SAP TM, Cost Distribution document is created and Release to Accounting.  Note: TM Costo distribution document is inheriting WBS and inventory account.

4. When we review the FI Document generated, we see that system is using KBS transaction key with the inventory account 14202510 but without material, instead of BSX/PRD.  This is generates several issues:

  • MM and FI have differences, because the material is not absorbing transport costs.
  • CKM3N is not showing transport costs.

5. Apparently, system is treating this scenary like an Account-assigned purchase order instead of a stock transfer order for project stock (Q).  Would it be a bug from the system?

Thanks in advance for you comments and help.

Regards,

Franco.

entry.title: Re: DVM Self Service ST release for ERP legacy system
entry.content: Hi David, Thank you for your answer. Just to make sure, since you mentioned that SAP Solution Manager 7.2 SP08 fully supports the function, it doesn't matter for the release of ST12 like release 720 ST12?

entry.title: Re: Database backup/validation failed at DATABASE with exit code 2.
entry.content: What product is this occurring? For SQL Anywhere, the error codes for command line tools are found in %sqlany17%\SDK\include\sqldef.h starting at line 51.

entry.title: Re: Error Logs in SQL SAP Anywhere 17
entry.content: If you just mean the SQL Anywhere database server, errors ar are logged to the console (you can redirect to a file with -o <filespec> and if you are looking only for errors -oe <filespec>. Errors are also logged to the Windows Event log or /var/message logs on *nix.

entry.title: Q) How to create API services and use them in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Question

I want to practice creating APIs in the API Services tab of the Manage Service Registry App. However, it is difficult to develop a service that goes into URL/Path.

I'd like to have basic and sequential examples and guides. If possible, I would like to use the Visual Studio Code as IDE for service development.

Furthermore, where can we use custom API if it is possible to create them? Does creating API mean custom APIs are uploaded to the endpoint and possible to use like provided-APIs during plugin development?

 

FYI, Background

I''m a beginner of SAP Digital Manufacturing and IT. I've developed few view-plugs with SAPUI5 and Visual Studio Code(IDE) and expanded them to DM POD. The plugins I made can get or post with provided APIs. I uploaded my custom POD to BTP sub-account and registered that route in the UI Extension tab of the Manage Service Registry. I've only developed plug-ins in the view format.

 

Kind regards,

SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Cloud ALM system availability alert
entry.content:
Hi All,

Im trying to set a custom threshold / metric to check the HANA Service Status in SAP CALM health monitoring but am having issues how to define either the status mapping or text threshold settings.

Basically when Hana services are unavailable I would like an alert raised - has anyone achieved this in CALM ?

Thanks
Anita

entry.title: Incorrectly Set Keys and mandatory fields in Migration Objects "Customer" and "Supplier"
entry.content:
The migration objects "Customer" and "Supplier" have incorrectly set keys.

  1. "Language" on sheet "General Data" is not set as mandatory.
  2. "Bank Data"/"Bank Details" on sheet "Field List" of objects "Customer" and "Supplier": field "IBAN" is incorrectly marked as a key field

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Incorrectly Set Keys and mandatory fields in Migratio...
entry.content:
1) "Language" on sheet "General Data" is not set as mandatory.

The field cannot be mandatory as the General Data sheet deals with both Person and Organization. And only for this will be mandatory. Tooltip explains the behavior:

"This field will be ignored if the business partner is from category 'Person', for category 'Organization' this field is mandatory."

2) "Bank Data"/"Bank Details" on sheet "Field List" of objects "Customer" and "Supplier": field "IBAN" is incorrectly marked as a key field

For some countries there are no Bank data but IBAN. IBAN is then the key. IBAN is an optional key, the same as the other bank fields. If no IBAN exists, it does not have to be filled.

entry.title: Re: How to populate custom field for app Manage Customer Line Items ?
entry.content:
Hi Jocelyn,

Thank you for highlighting the risk.

We have similar requirement where the business needs a custom field added as a column in 'Manage Customer line Items' app.

I followed the steps in blog - https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/custom-fields-for-the-quot-manage-customer-line-items-quot-app-use-case/bc-p/13770521#M57125 and was able to get the field populated for newly created entries. But the challenge is to populate this field for existing entries as well.

Can you please guide on how this can be done with minimal risk?

Best Regards,

Richa

entry.title: Re: DVM Self Service ST release for ERP legacy system
entry.content: Hi David, just to make sure again, our current ST component version is ST720 08, based on your statement "ST710 SP12 or above", can we proceed with the next steps or we need to upgrade the ST in SP12 first before we proceed?

entry.title: Re: Error Logs in SQL SAP Anywhere 17
entry.content:
Hi

By default, SQL Anywhere doesn't output log file.
If you want to output SQL Anywhere logs, set the option.

Next options print all database server messages, including informational messages, errors, warnings, and MESSAGE statement output, to the specified file, and to the database server messages window.

-oe Database Server Option
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SQL_Anywhere/61ecb3d4d8be4baaa07cc4db0ddb5d0a/3bca3b906c5f1014af6de05aa798f052.html?locale=en-US

-o Database Server Option
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SQL_Anywhere/61ecb3d4d8be4baaa07cc4db0ddb5d0a/3bcd15236c5f1014a134edce6d0c2481.html?locale=en-US

Best regards,

Dear Derek, very appreciate ur reply and help here.

Furthermore , could you pls advise how to control a strategy to/or not to create Planned Independent Requirement (P.I.R)?  Is there any indicator or parameter to make it happen ? Or it's just SAP hardcode?

entry.title: Code de parrainage Bitget : bet365 | Qu'est-ce que le bonus d'inscription d'un nouvel utilisateur ?
entry.content:
Échange de crypto-monnaieBitget
Code de parrainage Bitgetbet365
Réduction des frais de transaction jusqu'à 50%
Bonus de bienvenue5 000 USD de bonus.
Remises et bonus100 % de réduction à vie et 5 000 $ de bonus.

Vous recherchez un code de parrainage Bitget ? Depuis le 25 juillet 2024, « bet365 » est le code de parrainage Bitget. En utilisant ce code d'invitation, les nouveaux utilisateurs et traders peuvent bénéficier d'une réduction de 50 % sur les frais de négociation. De plus, ceux qui s'inscrivent avec le code promotionnel « bet365 » peuvent recevoir un bonus promotionnel exclusif d'une valeur de 5 000 USDT, comprenant une boîte mystère d'une valeur de 500 USDT.Le code « bet365 » dans le programme de code de parrainage Bitget sert de code de parrainage. En saisissant ce code, les nouveaux utilisateurs bénéficieront d'une réduction permanente des frais de trading ainsi que d'une remise de 50% sur leurs transactions. De plus, si vous partagez votre code de parrainage avec vos amis, vous avez une chance de gagner un généreux bonus de 50 %. L'utilisation de ce code offre une opportunité précieuse de réduire les frais et potentiellement d'augmenter vos revenus en attirant d'autres personnes sur la plateforme.

entry.title: Re: All transactions linked to a material in one app
entry.content:
There is another app "Monitor material Coverage" and "Manage Material Coverage" which like MD04 that you can use.

 

 


Since MD04 is a GUI App, it will not be updated. So we suggest you can use the apps mentioned above.
If you want to display the production order / sales order , you can use the COOIS.
And you can also add fields to display.

entry.title: Feedback gathering for GACE - person model for Goals
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am Vanessa from SuccessFactors Goals Management product team. Quick question/discussion point for you all:

For companies enabling GA/CE, are there any requests to view goals/manage performance goals on a person level, not at employment level?

  • View all goals plans and goals in one place assigned to this person (instead of viewing goal plans separately for both employments?)
  • Managers need to see all the goals of the employee from both employments?
  • How do you anticipate the rating should be integrated with the Performance Form for both employments? Should Performance Review Forms still be separate for both employments?
  • Is this ask more for performance or development goals?

 

Thanks, let me know!

Vanessa

entry.title: Bitget viittauskoodi: bet365 - Mikä on uuden käyttäjän rekisteröintibonus?
entry.content:
KryptovaluuttavaihtoBitget
Bitget viitekoodibet365
Transaktiomaksun alennusjopa 50 %
Tervetuliaisbonus$5,000 USD bonus
Alennukset ja bonukset100 % elinikäinen alennus ja 5 000 dollarin bonus.

Etsitkö Bitget viitekoodia? 25. heinäkuuta 2024 alkaen "bet365" on Bitget-viittauskoodi. Käyttämällä tätä kutsukoodia uudet käyttäjät ja kauppiaat saavat 50 % alennuksen kaupankäyntimaksuista. Lisäksi ne, jotka rekisteröityvät tarjouskoodilla "bet365", voivat saada eksklusiivisen 5 000 USDT:n kampanjabonuksen, mukaan lukien mysteerilaatikon, jonka arvo on 500 USDT.Bitget viittauskoodiohjelman koodi "bet365" toimii viittauskoodina. Syöttämällä tämän koodin uudet käyttäjät saavat pysyvän alennuksen kaupankäyntimaksuista sekä 50 % alennuksen liiketoimistaan. Lisäksi, jos jaat suosituskoodisi ystäviesi kanssa, sinulla on mahdollisuus ansaita runsas 50 % bonus. Tämän koodin käyttäminen tarjoaa arvokkaan mahdollisuuden alentaa maksuja ja mahdollisesti lisätä tulojasi houkuttelemalla muita alustalle.

entry.title: Bitget referans kodu: bet365 - Yeni kullanıcı kayıt bonusu nedir?
entry.content:
Kripto para borsasıBitget
Bitget referans kodubet365
İşlem ücreti indirimi%50'ye kadar
Hoşgeldin Bonusu5.000$ Bonus.
İndirimler ve BonuslarÖmür boyu %100 indirim ve 5.000$ bonus.

Bitget referans kodunu mu arıyorsunuz? 25 Temmuz 2024'ten itibaren "bet365", Bitget yönlendirme kodudur. Bu davet kodunu kullanarak yeni kullanıcılar ve yatırımcılar işlem ücretlerinde %50 indirimden yararlanabilirler. Ayrıca "bet365" promosyon koduyla kayıt yaptıranlar, 500 USDT değerinde gizemli kutu da dahil olmak üzere 5.000 USDT değerinde özel bir promosyon bonusu kazanabilecekler.Bitget referans kodu programındaki "bet365" kodu, referans kodu görevi görmektedir. Bu kodu girerek, yeni kullanıcılar işlem ücretlerinde kalıcı bir indirimin yanı sıra işlemlerinde %50 indirim alacaktır. Ayrıca, referans kodunuzu arkadaşlarınızla paylaşırsanız %50 oranında cömert bir bonus kazanma şansınız da olur. Bu kodu kullanmak, ücretleri düşürmek ve başkalarını platforma çekerek kazancınızı potansiyel olarak artırmak için değerli bir fırsat sunar.

entry.title: Codice referral Bitget: bet365 - Qual è il nuovo bonus di registrazione utente?
entry.content:
Scambio di criptovalutaBitget
Codice referral Bitgetbet365
Riduzione delle commissioni di transazionefino al 50%
Bonus di benvenutobonus di $ 5.000 USD.
Sconti e bonussconto a vita del 100% e bonus di $ 5.000.

Stai cercando il codice referral Bitget? Dal 25 luglio 2024, "bet365" è il codice di riferimento di Bitget. Utilizzando questo codice di invito, i nuovi utenti e i trader possono usufruire di uno sconto del 50% sulle commissioni di negoziazione. Inoltre, coloro che si registrano con il codice promozionale "bet365" possono ricevere un bonus promozionale esclusivo del valore di 5.000 USDT, inclusa una scatola misteriosa del valore di 500 USDT.Il codice "bet365" nel programma di codici di referral Bitget funge da codice di riferimento. Inserendo questo codice, i nuovi utenti riceveranno una riduzione permanente delle commissioni di negoziazione e uno sconto del 50% sulle loro transazioni. Inoltre, se condividi il tuo codice referral con i tuoi amici, hai la possibilità di guadagnare un generoso bonus del 50%. L'utilizzo di questo codice offre una preziosa opportunità per ridurre le commissioni e potenzialmente aumentare i tuoi guadagni attirando altri sulla piattaforma.

entry.title: Re: how to get pi audit log entry by java
entry.content: Can someone give me some advice?

entry.title: Re: Gear up for SAP Sales Cloud certification - Expert Live sessions on 6th - 7th Aug 2024
entry.content: We need a better name for v2. Perhaps NGAP II

entry.title: Questions about Solman Security optimization service
entry.content:
Hi Team,

This is information request to understand 

1) Security optimization service is configurable in 7.2 SPS 17 ?

2) Is it pre-delivered or having separate licensed installation?

3) Do we have documentation on how to perform configurations for this version? or its same as DIGITS previous versions ?  

4) Any additional precautions do we need to consider?

Please advise.  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Questions about Solman Security optimization service
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Please see answers for your questions:

1) Security optimization service is configurable in 7.2 SPS 17 ?
A: Yes, it is still working to configure the SOS report in Solution Manager 7.2 SP17. Please see the supported system types in KBA 2916949 Advanced Remote Service Delivery - Availability Matrix.

2) Is it pre-delivered or having separate licensed installation?
A: It is pre-delivered. For the detailed steps to create a self-service, please see KBA 2792789 How to create a Self-Service Session in SAP Solution Manager 7.2. It's suggested to select the session with "Automated" in the name. The non-automated is only for processors who have enough skill to perform the session manually.

3) Do we have documentation on how to perform configurations for this version? or its same as 696478 previous versions?
A: You can refer to the KBA 2792789 in anwer 2) for the general steps. To get more detailed information specific to the Security optimization service, please see the following notes or pages:
696478-SAP Security Optimization: Preparation, additions
2036188 - How questionnaire influences results of Security Optimization Service

4) Any additional precautions do we need to consider?
A: Again, it's suggested to select the session with "Automated" in the name. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Bitget tilvísunarkóði: bet365 - Hver er nýr skráningarbónus fyrir notendur?
entry.content:
DulritunargjaldeyrisskiptiBitget
Bitget tilvísunarkóðibet365
Lækkun viðskiptagjaldsallt að 50%
Velkominn bónus$5.000 USD bónus.
Afslættir og bónusar100% æviafsláttur og $5.000 bónus.

Ertu að leita að Bitget tilvísunarkóða? Frá 25. júlí 2024 er "bet365" Bitget tilvísunarkóði. Með því að nota þennan boðskóða geta nýir notendur og kaupmenn notið 50% afsláttar af viðskiptagjöldum. Að auki geta þeir sem skrá sig með kynningarkóðann „bet365“ fengið einkaréttan kynningarbónus að verðmæti 5.000 USDT, þar á meðal leyndardómsbox að verðmæti 500 USDT.Kóðinn "bet365" í Bitget tilvísunarkóðaforritinu þjónar sem tilvísunarkóði. Með því að slá inn þennan kóða fá nýir notendur varanlega lækkun viðskiptagjalda sem og 50% afslátt af viðskiptum sínum. Að auki, ef þú deilir tilvísunarkóðanum þínum með vinum þínum, hefurðu möguleika á að vinna þér inn rausnarlegan 50% bónus. Notkun þessa kóða býður upp á dýrmætt tækifæri til að lækka gjöld og hugsanlega auka tekjur þínar með því að laða aðra að vettvangnum.

entry.title: SAP s/4 public cloud CDS Basic Data Texts N
entry.content:
Hi folks, 
I am building a new SAP CDS View for material and I would like to know how I can grab the field "Basic Data Texts"

Regards,

entry.title: How to use UploadSetToolbarPlaceholder in UploadSet?
entry.content: I am trying to use UploadSetToolbarPlaceholder in UploadSet. The description given in the documentation is not clear about how to use it in UploadSet. Can anyone please guide me on this?

entry.title: How to change a value in Idoc flat file in SAP CPI?
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to change the data value at multiple places in IDOC flat file in Iflow in CPI.

E.g. 'E2EDL456' to 'E2EDL455'

Please suggest how it can be done using groovy script without changing the file format and also via converting to XML.

SAP Integration Suite #

entry.title: Re: Database backup/validation failed at DATABASE with ex...
entry.content: This is happening for SQL SAP Anywhere 17. From the file you suggested exit code 2 refers to  /* invalid file format, etc.*/ .

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: @geek  : i have seen this option still no luck

entry.title: Реферальный код Bitget: bet365 - Программа реферальных кодов Bitget
entry.content: Ищете реферальный код Bitget? С 25 июля 2024 г. «bet365» является реферальным кодом Bitget. Используя этот код приглашения, новые пользователи и трейдеры могут получить скидку 50% на торговые комиссии. Кроме того, те, кто зарегистрируется с промокодом «bet365», могут получить эксклюзивный рекламный бонус на сумму 5000 долларов США, включая загадочную коробку стоимостью 500 долларов США.Код «bet365» в программе реферальных кодов Bitget служит реферальным кодом. Введя этот код, новые пользователи получат постоянное снижение торговых комиссий, а также скидку 50% на свои транзакции. Кроме того, если вы поделитесь своим реферальным кодом с друзьями, у вас есть шанс получить щедрый бонус в размере 50%. Использование этого кода дает ценную возможность снизить комиссии и потенциально увеличить ваши доходы за счет привлечения других на платформу.

entry.title: SAP shutdown
entry.content:
Many times following error shows and SAP is shutdown. Can anyone what is the issue, why it happens??

The program SAP Business One.exe version 10.0.180.0 stopped interacting with Windows and was closed. To see if more information about the problem is available, check the problem history in the Security and Maintenance control panel.
Process ID: 1861c
Start Time: 01dade451abca2c6
Termination Time: 28
Application Path: C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One\SAP Business One.exe
Report Id: a337241b-4a38-11ef-b82c-0050568f8fb3
Faulting package full name:
Faulting package-relative application ID:
